ranked_findings.title: Fitness Sharing / Niching: Prevent Strategy Population Collapse
Security model covers only key management — no runtime sandboxing
Input guard lacks semantic analysis and multi-turn attack detecti
Evolution engine runs synchronously — 10x speedup possible with p
Tool synthesizer has no network sandbox — subprocess execution tr
Consciousness kernel introspection is read-only — no actionable g
Self-modifying code has no reversibility or approval gates
Tool synthesizer can discover and integrate external tools at run
Agent communication protocol is static — no protocol evolution me
Evolution fitness function is fixed — no meta-learning on what 'f
